{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Quelsar Cyclon
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Quelsar Cyclon]] is a man with a faded green eye who records the duel.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c26">''The Knight'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
